text:
Match the following columns:

| Column-I | Column-II |
| :--- | :--- |
| (A) Domain of $f(x) = \ln \tan^{-1} \{ (x^3 - 6x^2 + 11x - 6)x(e^x - 1) \}$ is | (P) $\left[-1, \frac{5}{4}\right]$ |
| (B) Range of $f(x) = \sin^2 \frac{x}{4} + \cos \frac{x}{4}$ is | (Q) $[2, \infty)$ |
| (C) The domain of function $f(x) = \sqrt{\log_{(|x| - 1)}(x^2 + 4x + 4)}$ is | (R) $(1, 2) \cup (3, \infty)$ |
| (D) Let $f(x) = \begin{cases} x^2 & x < 1 \\ x + 1 & x \ge 1 \end{cases}; g(x) = \begin{cases} x + 2 & x < 1 \\ x^2 & x \ge 1 \end{cases}$. Then range of function $f(g(x))$ is | (S) $[0, \infty)$ |
| | (T) $(-\infty, -3) \cup (-2, -1) \cup (2, \infty)$ |

Let $f(x) = \begin{cases} 1 + x; & 0 \le x \le 2 \\ 3 - x; & 2 < x \le 3 \end{cases}$;
$g(x) = f(f(x))$ :

| Column-I | Column-II |
| :--- | :--- |
| (A) If domain of $g(x)$ is $[a, b]$ then $b - a$ is | (P) $1$ |
| (B) If range of $g(x)$ is $[c, d]$ then $c + d$ is | (Q) $2$ |
| (C) $f(f(f(2))) + f(f(f(3)))$, is | (R) $3$ |
| (D) $m = \text{maximum value of } g(x) \text{ then } 2m - 2 \text{ is :}$ | (S) $4$ |
